raw_consumer_statement:
I disputed XXXX charges to XXXX XXXX  on my XXXX XXXX XXXX {$3000.00}, {$3000.00}, and XXXX XXXXXXXX the same project. I emailed XXXX a complete set of documentation covering all three disputes. XXXX approved and refunded the {$3500.00} charge using that documentation. 

However, XXXX later denied XXXX of the {$3000.00} charges, stating that too much time had passed. This is XXXX already had my evidence months earlier, and it was the same documentation used to approve the related dispute. I only realized the {$3000.00} claim hadnt been processed when the {$3500.00} refund posted. 

I re-submitted my documentation and emailed XXXX on XX/XX/year> to request escalation and clarification. XXXX did not address that they already had my original submission and simply said the claim was outside the time window. 

I am asking for XXXX to review or reopen this {$3000.00} dispute. The evidence was submitted on time and has already been accepted by XXXX and other card issuers ( XXXX and XXXX ) for the same merchant and issue.
